workDescription: ADM-008 POST-MERGE FIX 6 (adm-008-free-mechanics, branch feat/deals_unification): real redemption semantics for free_item/free_upgrade offer coupons. A pre-existing money leak routed 4 of 6 offer deal_type mechanics (buy_one_take_one, bundle, free_item, free_upgrade) through computeDealDiscountCents's cheapest-eligible-line branch, silently discounting the cheapest cart line and burning the coupon regardless of admin configuration. Delivered as 4 commits: P1 (35981fa, migration 0014 offers.benefit_product_id + partial null-guard), P1b (66cbb0e, widened deny-guard closing 2 residual leak classes found by adversarial review — b1t1/bundle permanent deny + configured-offer window hole), P3 (ad3e937, admin UI benefit-product picker + generate-panel block), P2 (cceb66b, real redemption math: free_item reuses computeRewardDiscountCents, new computeFreeUpgradeDiscountCents waives selected size-upgrade deltas; resolver becomes an explicit allowlist dispatch with a <=0 reject that also closes a legacy value-less-discount ₱0-and-burn path found during this cycle's own adversarial review; admin Zod cross-validation on merged PATCH state; zero-floor clamp at placement).
approver: general-purpose agent (evidence-pack generation pass, 17-07-26) — pack review is manual-first; APPROVE recorded here is evidentiary, not a substitute for the user's own sign-off
